name: ReverseLab Unified
installNote: Provides a unified Super Brain skill plus one-click deployment scripts. Recipients can run scripts/reverselab-deploy.ps1 -Apply -Profile Full -RegisterCodexMcp to clone/configure the external ReverseLab repositories, sync MCP dependencies, run the upstream all-tools installer, and verify status/toolcheck results.

skills.name: reverselab-unified
canDo: route reverse-engineering tasks to open-reverselab commands, Open-tgtylab MCP tools, or browser-act-skill-forge
detect whether both upstream ReverseLab repositories and MCP tools are available
run a one-click full deployment path for recipients when the external repositories or dependencies are missing
use local knowledge bases for PE/APK/CTF/website API reverse workflows
cannotDo: make external repositories available without cloning or bundling them
hide missing host-specific GUI/device setup from the final deploy report
skills.setupRequired: Run scripts/reverselab-deploy.ps1 -Apply -Profile Full -RegisterCodexMcp for full setup. Requires Git, Python/uv, network access for upstream repos/tools, and host-specific confirmation for GUI/device tools when upstream cannot automate them.
